block_00: 7 habits to improve your trading routine
block_01: What are the things that separate professional traders from beginners? Amongst other things – the habits that they have. More experienced traders normally develop useful habits that help them make better trading decisions.
block_02: For instance, a habit of researching their assets and reading the news is one that goes a long way. Check the full article for 7 trading habits that you may implement today and see if you could benefit from them.
block_05: If you’ve ever used a technical indicator, you know that any indicator can give out unclear or wrong signals, when the indicator doesn’t follow the asset price and goes the opposite way. But not many traders know that these “wrong signals” could be helpful to a trader. Read about divergence to learn how to use it in your advantage.
block_07: Trading anxiety: how not to be afraid
block_08: You know that feeling of worry, when you are not sure if you are closing the deal too soon or if you should leave it running for a bit more? Or the fear of losing or missing out? The fear stops now: read about the steps you can take to grow trading confidence.
